description: A vertical designed graphic combining a photo with slogan typography and three clipped news headlines. The top portion is a color photograph of Donald Trump (navy suit, red tie) walking and gesturing among industrial steel-mill workers wearing orange high-visibility coveralls and hard hats, with a large American flag and rolled steel coils in the background. A dark navy gradient fades the lower portion, where white serif typography reads italic 'The Most Pro-Worker Legislation' above bold all-caps 'IN HISTORY!'. Below are three torn-paper-style headline clippings: (1) 'FOX NEWS — Service industry workers reaping the benefits of Trump's 'no tax on tips''; (2) 'KLTV — ‘Big Beautiful Bill’ will no longer tax overtime, tips'; (3) 'THE COLLEGE FIX — $500 billion now available for trade schools, thanks to Trump budget'. The technique uses a heroic image of the President among blue-collar workers plus aggregated favorable press to brand the One Big Beautiful Bill as historically pro-worker (no tax on tips/overtime, trade-school funding). Target audience: blue-collar and service workers, trade-school students, and supporters.
notable_text: The Most Pro-Worker Legislation IN HISTORY!; FOX NEWS — Service industry workers reaping the benefits of Trump's 'no tax on tips'; KLTV — ‘Big Beautiful Bill’ will no longer tax overtime, tips; THE COLLEGE FIX — $500 billion now available for trade schools, thanks to Trump budget
